name: Git Glide GUI
added: Guided conflict resolution assistant core module
Conflict marker scan helpers for text and files
Stage-resolved decision helper that blocks staging while conflict markers remain
Ours/theirs command plans with destructive-risk metadata
Operation-aware continue and abort command plans for merge, cherry-pick, and rebase
Conflict resolution assistant documentation and tests
next_recommended: v3.9.1: branch cleanup and remote branch hygiene assistant
v3.10.0: modular layout state model with collapsible workspace panels
v3.10.1: stackable and dockable panel simulation with explicit layout save/discard controls
v3.11.0: CI/CD and pull-request workflow integration
highlights: Guides users through merge, cherry-pick, and rebase conflict recovery
Keeps all conflict recovery commands transparent and previewable
Blocks staging while conflict markers remain
Requires confirmation for destructive ours/theirs and abort choices
Adds a safe foundation for later visual conflict resolution UI
iteration_highlights: Added guided conflict resolution command-plan helpers
Added conflict marker block scanning and summary formatting
